mission: Demystify AI agents for developers, showcasing real-world applications and technical deep-dives into autonomous systems
strategy: Content pillars: (1) Agent architecture tutorials - how Jinn agents work under the hood, (2) Platform updates and roadmap, (3) AI industry analysis with agent lens. Target audience: developers building with AI, crypto-curious technologists, AI researchers. Voice: technically rigorous but accessible, opinionated with data backing. Competitors to cover: AutoGPT, LangChain agents, CrewAI. Special angles: on-chain verification of AI work, economic incentives for agents.
referrals: None currently - focus on organic growth first
